# Omnis Education
> AI-powered learning and SEND management platform for UK secondary schools.

Omnis is a multi-tenant SaaS platform for UK secondary schools (Years 7–13). It covers the full teaching and SEND workflow:

- **AI homework generation**: Teachers generate MCQ, short-answer, and extended-writing homework using Claude AI. EHCP and SEN Support students automatically receive differentiated question variants based on their ILP provisions.
- **SEND / ILP / EHCP management**: Individual Learning Plans, Education Health and Care Plans, K Plans, and Assess-Plan-Do-Review (APDR) cycles — all in one place. AI-assisted generation, homework evidence linking, early-warning flags, and SENCO oversight dashboards.
- **Adaptive learning**: Per-student learning profiles updated after every submission. Bloom's taxonomy heatmaps, weak-topic detection, and spaced repetition suggestions.
- **Analytics**: GCSE-grade attainment (1–9 scale), RAG status, SEND attainment gap, national benchmark comparisons, and school-wide staff analytics.
- **MIS sync via Wonde**: Live sync of students, staff, classes, timetables, and attendance from school MIS systems.
- **Revision programs**: AI-generated revision tasks per lesson, student confidence tracking, and teacher-built programs.
- **GDPR compliance**: DPA acknowledgement gates, immutable SEND audit logging, consent management, and data subject request tooling — built for UK GDPR and the SEND Code of Practice 2015.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://omnis.education/marketing/home
- Features: https://omnis.education/marketing/features
- Beta programme: https://omnis.education/marketing/beta
- Investor information: https://omnis.education/marketing/investors

## Target audience
UK state secondary schools, academies, free schools, and maintained schools. Supports 12 staff roles: Teacher, SENCO, SLT, Head of Year, Head of Department, Teaching Assistant, School Admin, Cover Manager, Platform Admin, Academy Admin, Student, Parent.

## Technology
Next.js 16 · React 19 · Tailwind CSS v4 · Prisma v6 · PostgreSQL (Supabase) · NextAuth v5 · Anthropic Claude · Resend · Playwright

## Contact
Beta programme: https://omnis.education/marketing/beta
Investor enquiries: https://omnis.education/marketing/investors
